code: const BOOKING_DRAFT_KEY="bus-booking-draft";export const loadBookingDraft=()=>{try{const raw=window.sessionStorage.getItem(BOOKING_DRAFT_KEY);if(!raw)return null;return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(error){console.error("Failed to load booking draft",error);return null;}};export const saveBookingDraft=draft=>{window.sessionStorage.setItem(BOOKING_DRAFT_KEY,JSON.stringify(draft));};export const clearBookingDraft=()=>{window.sessionStorage.removeItem(BOOKING_DRAFT_KEY);};
